    if nName < 0 || zName.is_null() {

    let keyword_code = unsafe {

}

pub extern "C" fn sqlite3_keyword_check(zName: *const u8, nName: i32) -> i32 {
    const TK_ID: i32 = 60;
    
    if nName < 0 || zName.is_null() {
        return 1;
    }
    
    let keyword_code = unsafe {
        let slice = std::slice::from_raw_parts(zName, nName as usize);
        sqlite3KeywordCode(slice)
    };
    
    if TK_ID != keyword_code { 1 } else { 0 }
}
